title: ENT Department at UHDC Dehradun
description: The ENT Department at UHDC Dehradun provides comprehensive care for patients with ear, nose, and throat conditions. Our team of experienced specialists offers a wide range of diagnostic and treatment options, ensuring the best possible outcomes for our patients.

content.overview: The Department of ENT at Uttaranchal Hospital & Diagnostic Centre (UHDC), Dehradun provides comprehensive care for disorders related to the ear, nose, throat, head, and neck. The department is supported by experienced ENT specialists, skilled nursing staff, and modern medical infrastructure to ensure safe, effective, and patient-centered treatment.We offer a wide range of services, including the management of ear infections, hearing disorders, sinusitis, nasal allergies, throat conditions, voice disorders, and head & neck infections. The department is equipped with advanced diagnostic tools and well-established Operation Theatres (OT) for both minor and major ENT procedures, ensuring quality care for routine as well as emergency cases.Our approach is based on evidence-based allopathic practices, focusing on accurate diagnosis, timely intervention, and compassionate patient care while maintaining the highest standards of safety and clinical excellence.

faq.question: What kinds of ENT problems are handled here?
faq.answer: The department supports ear, nose, and throat concerns, including diagnostic evaluation, treatment planning, and procedural care when needed.

faq.question: Are minor procedures available?
faq.answer: Depending on the condition, the department can support medical management and suitable procedural interventions as part of care.

faq.question: Do I need to book before visiting?
faq.answer: Booking ahead is recommended so the team can prepare for your consultation and direct you to the right service efficiently.
